items.title: South Bay home prices hold firm as spring buyers compete for limited inventory
items.summary: Santa Clara County continues to see multiple offers on well-priced homes despite higher mortgage rates, with San Jose and Sunnyvale leading demand.

items.title: Silicon Valley tech hiring rebound supports Bay Area housing demand
items.summary: A pickup in tech employment across Mountain View and Santa Clara is bringing more qualified buyers back into the market this season.

items.title: Mortgage rates hover near 6.75% as markets weigh Fed's next move
items.summary: The 30-year fixed remains range-bound, keeping monthly payments elevated but stable for South Bay buyers.

items.title: Inventory ticks up across Santa Clara County heading into summer
items.summary: New listings rose month-over-month, giving buyers slightly more choice while days-on-market stayed low for turnkey homes.

items.title: Condo and townhome demand grows as buyers seek affordability in the South Bay
items.summary: First-time buyers are increasingly turning to townhomes and condos in San Jose and Sunnyvale to enter the market.
